tweets.author: drsimonbutler.bsky.social
tweets.text:
Bitcoin dropped below £63,000 on hawkish Fed news.
Short-term volatility often masks Bitcoin's robust fundamentals.
Long-term holders now control 79% of the supply, a record, as K33 notes.
True conviction prioritises enduring value over fleeting headlines.
